integration_validation_v2.evidence: comfy.rs:2285-2509 record_comfy_output_registration_failure persists retryable evidence (migration 0103, mod.rs:2052) and retry_comfy_output_registration_failure re-registers into atelier_comfy_intake_output and marks resolved; tests/atelier_comfy_tests.rs:753-925 proves output not lost (list_intake_outputs empty before retry), saved artifact recoverable, evidence secret-scrubbed, machine-local ref rejected, and FAILURE_RECORDED/RETRIED event counts increment on real EventLedger.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-102 [Pose-ComfyUI-Pipeline] Output-First Registration Failure Recovery -- Preserve generated output before registration and create retryable failure evidence so a saved image can be registered later.
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Output-First Registration Failure Recovery
